name: Chickaritos Dgsv43a
recipeInstructions:
This is one box (17 1/4 oz) of the frozen puff pastry sheets, or you may use the pie pastry for a double-crust 10 inch pie.
In a bowl, combine chicken, chilies, onions, cheese and seasonings. Mix well; chill until ready to use. Remove half of the pastry from refrigerator at a time. On a lightly floured board, roll to a 9 in. x 12 in. rectangle. Cut into nine small rectangles. Place about 2 tablespoons of filling across the center of each rectangle. Wet edges of pastry with water and roll pastry around filling. Crimp ends with a fork to seal. Repeat with remaining pastry and filling. Place, seam side down, on a lightly greased cookie sheet. Refrigerate until ready to heat. Bake at 425 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm with salsa and guacamole. Yield: 18 appetizers or 6-8 main-dish servings.
